expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
The top unresolved Sentry issue is **SENTRY-3029** ("OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events") with **4,665 events** in the **search** service.

I sent an email to **oncall@acme.io** with:
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

Confirmation: Email sent successfully (1 row inserted).

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count, project, level FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}
